## Results — across four datasets

![Throughput comparison](figures/throughput-bar.png)

- **Dataset A**: 3.2× speedup over baseline (n=10, p<0.01)
- **Dataset B**: 2.7× speedup with 1.4× memory footprint trade
- **Dataset C**: 4.1× on the synthetic stress test
- **Dataset D**: 1.9× on the smallest workload, regression area

_Error bars are 95% bootstrap CIs over 30 runs._
